title: Vanilla ReWoven
description: A Vanilla compatible Modpack that allows for cross-play between Java and Bedrock editions.
body:
Join your friends on Bedrock edition with a Modpack that brings both experiences to a new level together!

This Modpack includes:

 - GUI changes to make Java edition more feature rich and bedrock-like
 - Performance enhancements
 - Worldgen changes via Stardust Labs datapacks
 - Safer and more fulfilling exploration thanks to PeacefulSurface and Dungeons and Taverns
 - Harder monsters and bosses via Nox, MobCaptains, PortalLock, and True Ending
 - Progression, balance, and QoL changes thanks to Fabrication, VanillaRefresh, and many more
 - Extra dimensions, of which I won't spoil here
 -  Bundled in shaders complements of Complementary Reimagined
 - ...and a ton more!

It's helpful to keep in mind that not everyone will like all of these changes, and for those who know how I'd recommend adjusting the configs of (or removing outright) a number of mods here like Nox, PeacefulSurface, Fabrication, and others. These change the game somewhat dramatically and can make things harder or easier than some folk like. Most mods in this pack can be safely removed if unwanted and still maintain Bedrock Compatibility, so long as you leave Geyser and Floodgate in place. 

**PLEASE NOTE:**
This Modpack is for hosting worlds that allow Bedrock players to join. It does not allow Java players to join Bedrock worlds, but for both Bedrock and Java (modded or not) players to join a server hosting this Modpack. This Modpack isn't strictly required to join servers running it, but it's recommended for the best experience. If you wish to host this pack, please make sure that you've either port forwarded if you're hosting yourself, or you adjust the configs for Geyser (and SVC/Bluemap if desired) to be the ports you're allowed by your hosting provider. If you need a server host, the service I personally use and stand by is Kinetic Hosting. If you want to send a kickback my way, you can use my [Affiliate Link](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=477) and code "ARACHNID" for 15% off your first month.
